tagline: Count Every Rep. Own Your Progress.
description: Track your reps and sets during every workout. SetForge stores everything locally — no account, no cloud, no ads. Free for Windows and Android.
long_description: SetForge is built for the gym floor — not a dashboard. Tap to count each rep, log the weight, save the set. Your full workout history lives on your device, searchable and private. No subscription, no account required, no data sent anywhere.
meta_og_title: SetForge — Count Every Rep. Own Your Progress.
meta_og_description: A privacy-first gym rep counter for Windows and Android. Your workout data stays on your device.
hero_headline:
Count Every Rep.
Own Your Progress.
hero_subheadline: SetForge is a privacy-first gym tracker built for your workout — not your data.
features_subheadline: Everything you need to track your progress. Nothing you don't.
feature_no_account_description: Your data lives on your device. No sign-in, no cloud sync, no ads — ever.
feature_tap_to_count_description: One tap per rep. Built for sweaty hands, mid-set focus, and zero friction.
feature_history_description: Every set, every exercise, every session — searchable and browsable, forever.
feature_scales_description: Four font sizes so the rep count is readable from across the room.
feature_custom_exercises_description: Add any lift to your library, not just what we decided to include.
feature_cross_platform_description: The same app on Windows desktop and Android. Your history goes where you go.
screenshots_subheadline: A focused interface designed for the moment you're in.
screenshot_counter_caption: Tap to count. Weight entry optional. Save when your set is done.
screenshot_history_caption: Browse every workout, every set, all the way back to day one.
screenshot_exercises_caption: Your full exercise library — default lifts plus anything you add.
download_subheadline: Available now for Windows and Android. macOS and iOS coming soon.
download_play_store_note: Google Play Store listing coming soon.
download_apple_note: macOS and iOS support coming soon.
download_source_note: Prefer to build from source? The full code is on GitHub.
privacy_subheadline: No account. No tracking. No cloud. SetForge stores everything locally on your device.
privacy_local_storage_description: All workout data is stored in a SQLite database on your device. Nothing leaves.
privacy_no_analytics_description: Zero telemetry, zero tracking pixels, zero third-party scripts.
privacy_open_source_description: The full source code is public. Audit it, fork it, or contribute.
